title: Another Brick in the Wall
why_this_song: Another Brick in the Wall by Pink Floyd (1979) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: We don't need no thought control
No dark sarcasm in the classroom
If you don't eat yer meat, you can't have any pudding
How can you have any pudding if you don't eat yer meat?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "need" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "need" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Hey, teacher, leave them kids alone

exercises.prompt_en: "Another Brick in the Wall" was released in 1979. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Another Brick in the Wall" foi lançada em 1979. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Another Brick in the Wall" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Another Brick in the Wall" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Pink Floyd one question about "Another Brick in the Wall", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Pink Floyd sobre "Another Brick in the Wall", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Another Brick in the Wall" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Another Brick in the Wall" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Another Brick in the Wall" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Another Brick in the Wall" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
